name: project HECK
short_description: This is a casual and entertaining typing game that lets you experience the thrill of hacking systems by rapidly typing on your keyboard. Whether stress-testing your keyboard or unwinding after a tough day, this game has got you covered!
detailed_description:
If you had the skills of those cool movie hackers, typing a few keys to effortlessly seize everything,
would you choose the side of justice or evil? Or maybe you're just a big kid at heart, looking to cause some mischief.
In this typing (?) game, everyone is a genius hacker. Tap away on your keyboard, release some stress!
Enjoy the pleasant sound of the keys, feel the feedback, and immerse yourself in the mysterious hacking atmosphere!



In addition to the basic typing stress-relief, the game also features some advanced rules:
  • Time Limit: As the clock ticks down, feel the tension rise!
  • Progress Decrease: Uh-oh, the enemy has spotted you! They're trying to fend off your attack.
  • Red Light: Beware of the red warnings. Time your moves perfectly for attacking!

Game Modes

  • Normal Mode
  • Custom Mode
